issues.reason: The east vertical lane is structurally a full entrance-to-exit route, not just an optional branch, because it connects the bottom approach directly to the upFloor side. This does not break topology, but later stages must count it as one of the candidate routes or gate it clearly.
issues.required_change: Non-blocking: either treat the east lane as a real candidate route in later economy/monster placement, or convert it into a true branch by closing one connector such as around [11,4] or [11,5].

summary: Topology passes: MT0 is 13x13 with correct stair pair, valid topology-only tile codes, a connected entrance-to-exit graph, acceptable wall ratio, and enough structured route/branch space without an uncontrolled open grid.
